rule_metadata.name: Digispark_Attiny85
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'Digispark Attiny85' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule Digispark_Attiny85
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'Digispark Attiny85' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "Digispark Attiny85"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /USB\\VID_16D0\&PID_0753/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
